headline: A Look At Mettler Toledo (MTD) Valuation After Raised EPS Guidance And Strong Q1 2026 Results
summary: Why Mettler-Toledo International (MTD) is back in focus after Q1 2026 Mettler-Toledo International (MTD) moved back onto many investors’ watchlists after first quarter 2026 results showed higher net sales, year-on-year EPS growth and a lift to full year adjusted EPS guidance. See our latest analysis for Mettler-Toledo International. The 1 year total shareholder return of 19.76% contrasts with a year to date share price return of a 6.53% decline.
